title: Trump repeats claims that Iran deal is only 'days' away, despite recent strikes
summary_full: Speaking to reporters after attending the NBA Finals in New York, Trump said the two parties are in the final stages of a "very, very good deal".
summary_public: Speaking to reporters after attending the NBA Finals in New York, Trump said the two parties are in the final stages of a "very, very good deal".

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Trump repeats claims that Iran deal is only 'days' away
